title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 263.243 - State agency purchasing seed from nondomestic source containing noxious weeds, liability
text:
263.243.  State agency purchasing seed from nondomestic source containing noxious weeds, liability. — Any state agency purchasing seed from a nondomestic source, which seed contains any weed not native to this state which has been declared a noxious weed by this or any other state, shall be liable for eradication of the noxious weed or shall be liable to a landowner for costs of eradication.
(L. 1989 H.B. 869 § 2)
